summary: Asian stock markets opened lower, continuing significant declines from March 23rd due to geopolitical tensions stemming from US-Iran brinkmanship. Meanwhile, anticipation builds for Art Basel Hong Kong 2026, with preview days set for March 25-26.
key_events: Asian markets continue slide: Nikkei -4%, KOSPI -4.5%, Hang Seng -2%.
Escalating geopolitical risk: President Trump's ultimatum to Iran regarding Strait of Hormuz.
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026: Previews begin March 25, featuring 240 galleries.
Oil market volatility remains high amid potential energy infrastructure threats.
